stats.title: Walk-off Bloop Factory
stats.subtitle: Game-ending bloop singles. Higher = more chaos.

stats.title: Walk-off Winners
stats.subtitle: Games won on a walk-off play.

stats.title: Walk-off Wound Collectors
stats.subtitle: Games lost on an opponent walk-off.

stats.title: Two-Out Run Merchants
stats.subtitle: Share of runs scored with two outs.
stats.formula: runs with 2 outs ÷ total runs scored × 100

stats.title: One-Run Nailbiters
stats.subtitle: Games decided by a single run.

stats.title: One-Run Clutch Factor
stats.subtitle: Win rate in one-run games.

stats.title: Bonus Baseball Enjoyers
stats.subtitle: Games that went to extras.

stats.title: Free Baseball Specialists
stats.subtitle: Win rate in extra-inning games.

stats.title: Comeback Kids
stats.subtitle: Wins after trailing by 3+ runs at any point.

stats.title: Pitcher Duel Participants
stats.subtitle: Games where the team scored 2 or fewer runs.

stats.title: One-Run Heartbreakers
stats.subtitle: Losses by a single run.

stats.title: Extra-Inning Heartbreak
stats.subtitle: Losses in bonus baseball.

stats.title: GIDP Factory
stats.subtitle: Double plays hit into.

stats.title: Rally Killers
stats.subtitle: GIDPs with a runner on second (or worse).

stats.title: Triple Play Magnet
stats.subtitle: Triple plays hit into.

stats.title: Triple Play Likelihood
stats.subtitle: Triple plays per 1,000 golden opportunities.
stats.formula: triple plays hit into ÷ triple-play opportunities × 1,000

stats.title: Plunked Patrol
stats.subtitle: Hit-by-pitches absorbed.

stats.title: Blowout Loss Collector
stats.subtitle: Losses by five runs or more.

stats.title: Shutout Victims
stats.subtitle: Games where the team was held scoreless.

stats.title: Golden Sombrero Society
stats.subtitle: Games with a batter striking out 4+ times.

stats.title: Long Ball Punching Bag
stats.subtitle: Games where opponents hit 3+ home runs.

stats.title: Immaculate Inning Victims
stats.subtitle: Half-innings where all three outs were strikeouts.

stats.title: Steal Drought
stats.subtitle: Average games between successful steals.
stats.formula: games with play-by-play feed ÷ stolen bases

stats.title: Swipe Success Rate
stats.subtitle: Stolen bases per steal attempt.

stats.title: Green Light Fanatics
stats.subtitle: Steal attempts per game.
stats.formula: (stolen bases + caught stealing) ÷ games with feed

stats.title: Pickoff Punching Bag
stats.subtitle: Runners picked off.

stats.title: Caught Stealing Club
stats.subtitle: Runners thrown out stealing.

stats.title: TOOTBLAN Territory
stats.subtitle: Caught stealing plus pickoffs.

stats.title: Softest Dinger
stats.subtitle: Lowest exit velocity on a home run.
stats.formula: Minimum exit velocity on any home run

stats.title: Shortest Homer
stats.subtitle: Shortest measured home run distance.
stats.formula: Shortest Statcast distance on any home run

stats.title: Flarest Dinger
stats.subtitle: Highest launch angle on a home run.
stats.formula: Highest launch angle on any home run

stats.title: Hardest Hit
stats.subtitle: Highest exit velocity on any batted ball.
stats.formula: Maximum exit velocity on any batted ball

stats.title: Moonshot Society
stats.subtitle: Home runs with launch angle above 45°.

stats.title: Wall Scrapers
stats.subtitle: Home runs under 340 feet.

stats.title: No-Doubter Rate
stats.subtitle: Share of homers that were absolute tanks.
stats.formula: no-doubter homers (105+ mph, 20–35° LA) ÷ total homers × 100

stats.title: Barrel Bureau
stats.subtitle: Barrels per batted-ball event.

stats.title: Chop Shop
stats.subtitle: Grounders under 5° launch angle.
stats.formula: grounders under 5° launch angle ÷ batted-ball events × 100

stats.title: Pop-up Factory
stats.subtitle: Fly balls over 50° launch angle.
stats.formula: fly balls over 50° launch angle ÷ batted-ball events × 100

stats.title: Bloop Single Artists
stats.subtitle: Flares, bloops, and cheapies that fell.

stats.title: Infield Chaos
stats.subtitle: Leg hits, choppers, and seeing-eye grounders.

stats.title: Pitcher Hit Parade
stats.subtitle: Hits by pitchers (yes, really).
stats.formula: Hits by a pitcher batting (roster ID or play description starting with “Pitcher …”)

stats.title: Homer Drought
stats.subtitle: Average games between team home runs.
stats.formula: games with play-by-play feed ÷ team home runs

stats.title: GIDP Inducers
stats.subtitle: Double plays turned on opposing batters.

stats.title: Triple Play Turners
stats.subtitle: Triple plays turned on defense.

stats.title: Hardest Hit Allowed
stats.subtitle: Highest exit velocity surrendered on contact.
stats.formula: Maximum exit velocity allowed on any batted ball

stats.title: No-Hitter Bid Ruiners
stats.subtitle: Games where the first hit came after 6 hitless innings.

stats.title: Late-Inning Panic
stats.subtitle: Runs scored from the 8th inning on.

stats.title: First-Inning Ambush
stats.subtitle: Runs scored in the opening frame.

stats.title: True Outcome Enjoyers
stats.subtitle: Strikeout rate on plate appearances.

stats.title: Free Pass Fan Club
stats.subtitle: Walk rate on plate appearances.

stats.title: Intentional Walk Dealers
stats.subtitle: Intent walks per plate appearance.

stats.title: Sac Fly Merchants
stats.subtitle: Sacrifice flies per plate appearance.

stats.title: Sac Bunt Society
stats.subtitle: Small-ball sacrifice bunts.

stats.title: Blowout Bullies
stats.subtitle: Wins by five runs or more.

stats.title: Ten-Run Tantrums
stats.subtitle: Games with 10+ runs scored.

stats.title: Patience Is Overrated
stats.subtitle: Games without a single walk drawn.

stats.title: Balk Lottery Winners
stats.subtitle: Runs scored on balks.

stats.title: Wild Pitch Beneficiaries
stats.subtitle: Runs scored on wild pitches.

stats.title: Passed Ball Pirates
stats.subtitle: Runs scored on passed balls.

stats.title: Error-Assisted Runs
stats.subtitle: Runs scored with an error in the play.

stats.title: Cycle Game Club
stats.subtitle: Games where the team hit for the cycle.

stats.title: Back-to-Back Bombers
stats.subtitle: Games with consecutive home runs.

stats.title: Three Straight Dingers
stats.subtitle: Games with three consecutive home runs.

stats.title: Bases Loaded, No Runs
stats.subtitle: Half-innings: ducks on the pond, zero scored.

stats.title: LOB Stranded
stats.subtitle: Total runners left on base.

stats.title: LOB Nightmares
stats.subtitle: Games with 10+ runners left on base.

stats.title: Individual Cycle Club
stats.subtitle: Games where one batter hit for the cycle.
stats.formula: One batter records a single, double, triple, and home run in the same game

stats.title: Pinch-Hit Chaos
stats.subtitle: Pinch appearances ending in hit, HBP, HR, or K.

stats.title: Pinch-Hit Heroes
stats.subtitle: Hits by pinch hitters.

stats.title: Plunked the Most (One Game)
stats.subtitle: Most hit-by-pitches absorbed in a single game.

stats.title: Chaos Luck Index
stats.subtitle: Walk-offs, comeback wins, and gift runs minus misery per game.
stats.formula: (walk-off wins×3 + comeback wins×2 + error/balk/WP/PB runs − blowout losses − shutouts − golden sombreros) ÷ games with feed

stats.title: Win Percentage
stats.subtitle: Plain old wins divided by games played.

stats.title: Run Factory
stats.subtitle: Average runs scored per game with a full feed.
stats.formula: runs scored ÷ games with play-by-play feed

stats.title: Three True Outcomes Enjoyers
stats.subtitle: Strikeouts, walks, and homers per plate appearance.

stats.title: Double Play Rate
stats.subtitle: GIDPs per plate appearance.

stats.title: Homer Rate
stats.subtitle: Home runs per plate appearance.

stats.title: Small Ball Score
stats.subtitle: Sac bunts, sac flies, and stolen bases combined.

stats.title: Pinch-Hit Success
stats.subtitle: Pinch hits divided by pinch appearances.

stats.title: First-Inning Ambush Rate
stats.subtitle: Share of runs scored in the opening frame.

stats.title: Late-Inning Panic Rate
stats.subtitle: Share of runs scored from the 8th on.

stats.title: LOB Per Game
stats.subtitle: Runners left on base per game.

stats.title: Misfortune Index
stats.subtitle: GIDP, shutouts, blowout losses, and golden sombreros per game.
stats.formula: (GIDP + shutout games + blowout losses + golden sombreros) ÷ games with feed

stats.title: Grand Slam Society
stats.subtitle: Bases-clearing bombs.

stats.title: Inside-the-Park Club
stats.subtitle: Homers where the batter actually had to run.

stats.title: Slugfest Specialists
stats.subtitle: Games with 8+ runs scored.

stats.title: Whiff Fest Fridays
stats.subtitle: Games with 12+ team strikeouts.

stats.title: Leadoff Launchers
stats.subtitle: Home runs leading off a half-inning.

stats.title: Doubles Factory
stats.subtitle: Two-baggers hit.

stats.title: Triples Helmet Club
stats.subtitle: Three-baggers legged out.

stats.title: Extra-Base Rate
stats.subtitle: Doubles, triples, and homers per plate appearance.

stats.title: RISP Merchants
stats.subtitle: Batting average with runners in scoring position.
stats.formula: hits with RISP ÷ plate appearances with RISP × 100

stats.title: Pitching K Factory
stats.subtitle: Strikeouts recorded by the pitching staff per game.

stats.title: Pitches Seen Per Half
stats.subtitle: Average pitches the offense watches per half inning.

stats.title: Pitches Thrown Per Half
stats.subtitle: Average pitches the staff throws per defensive half inning.

stats.title: Pitches Per Plate Appearance
stats.subtitle: How many pitches batters see before the PA ends.

stats.title: Pitch Gluttons
stats.subtitle: Total pitches seen by the offense this season.

stats.title: Ball Hawk Rate
stats.subtitle: Share of pitches taken for balls.

stats.title: Foul Ball Factory
stats.subtitle: Total foul balls as the batting team.

stats.title: Foul Ball Rate
stats.subtitle: Share of pitches fouled off.

stats.title: Pitch Contact Rate
stats.subtitle: Share of pitches put in play (not foul, ball, or whiff).

stats.title: Whiff Per Pitch
stats.subtitle: Swinging strikes per pitch seen.

stats.title: Freeze Rate
stats.subtitle: Called strikes per pitch seen.

stats.title: Foul Ball Annoyers
stats.subtitle: Foul balls induced by the pitching staff per game.

stats.title: Contact Allowed Rate
stats.subtitle: Share of pitches the staff allows in play.
stats.formula: balls in play allowed ÷ pitches thrown × 100

stats.title: HBP Rate
stats.subtitle: Hit-by-pitches per plate appearance.

stats.title: Ball-in-Play Rate
stats.subtitle: Plate appearances ending in contact (not K, BB, or HR).

stats.title: Whiff Rate Per Game
stats.subtitle: Team strikeouts per game.

stats.title: Walks Per Game
stats.subtitle: Free passes drawn per game.

stats.title: Back-to-Back Sequences
stats.subtitle: Every consecutive homer pair (and beyond).

stats.title: Pinch-Hit Dinger Rate
stats.subtitle: Pinch-hit home runs per pinch appearance.

stats.title: Chaos Gift Runs
stats.subtitle: Runs scored on errors, balks, wild pitches, and passed balls per game.
stats.formula: (error + balk + WP + PB runs) ÷ games with feed

stats.title: Blowout Win Share
stats.subtitle: Share of wins that were by 5+ runs.

stats.title: Walkless Offense Rate
stats.subtitle: Games where the team drew zero walks.
